prompt: Create a high-fashion editorial portrait of a glamorous adult woman standing indoors in a dark luxury ballroom or stage set. She has long, voluminous, wavy champagne blonde hair cascading over one shoulder, with her face intentionally obscured by a centered square censor block in a muted warm taupe skin-tone color. Frame her from mid-thigh to head in a square 1:1 composition, body facing forward with a confident runway-pose posture. Dress her in a monochrome pearl ivory tailored suit: oversized satin blazer with structured shoulders, matching high-waisted trousers, and a cropped silky camisole or bustier top with subtle floral jacquard texture and delicate trim. Add elegant layered fine necklaces and one visible long dangling earring. The background should be black and gold, with ornate vertical gilded frames, crisscross geometric lines, and sparkling crystal chandeliers or hanging bead strands creating bokeh highlights. Use cinematic low-key lighting with soft frontal highlights, glossy fabric sheen, shallow depth of field, luxurious fashion-magazine styling, realistic skin and fabric textures, no text, no watermark.
